commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Manual maintainer review is the right lane because the remaining blocker is compatibility acceptance and current-head validation, not a narrow automated repair.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the diff adds no dependency/workflow/package changes and safe-read helpers reduce malformed plugin crash exposure. commands.review_summary:
The branch adds shared safe record/catalog projection helpers, applies them to provider-entry/discovery/paired API-key catalog paths, updates cron nullable tool schemas and Codex prompt snapshots, and wraps Matrix auto-join invite tasks for lint-safe error handling.

PR surface: Source +254, Tests +563. Total +817 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main directly enumerates and reads plugin-owned provider/model rows, so a throwing getter can abort projection before healthy siblings are used. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual maintainer review is the right lane because the remaining blocker is compatibility acceptance and current-head validation, not a narrow automated repair.
